title: A Holiday Change
overview: What better time for change than the Holidays? Crystal is raising her seventeen year old son by herself and along the way they experience a few bumps in the road. A Holiday Change is a story about forgiving, changing and most of all sharing the true meaning of love that the holiday season brings.
